shortDescription: Updated 2-bedroom bungalow in New Toronto offering single-level living and a finished basement.
fullDescription: Welcome to 120 Tenth Street in the vibrant New Toronto neighbourhood. This inviting bungalow offers the ease of single-level living with a generous lot and private garden. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. The sleeping quarters comprise 2 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. Additional highlights include in-suite laundry, ample storage, and energy-efficient mechanicals. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Surrounded by cafes, galleries, and boutiques
Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
